enableAutomaticRespawn.desc:: Enables automatic respawning of structures, default:true

minutesUntilRespawn.desc:: Sets the time after which a structure can respawn, the timer starts after the last activity within the structure. default:2880 minutes(48h)

increaseDifficultyWithRespawn.desc:: Enables increased difficulty for mobs in respawned dungeons(mobs can get enchanted items/potions effects), default: true

blockCountMod.desc:: Modifies the placed/broken block count, which can prevent respawn. Setting it to zero means respawn will ignore placed/broken blocks. Setting it higher than 1.0 makes it more likely that players breaking/placing things in the structure will prevent its respawn.By default it blocks respawn after 200+(scales slightly with structure size) blocks placed/broken. default: 1.0

dimensionBlackList.desc:: List of blacklisted dimension ids, e.g. minecraft:overworld  Seperate multiple entries by ,

respawnableStructures.desc:: List of structure IDs that should respawn always respawn, no matter if a player build sth inside, has a portal there etc.: e.g. minecraft:mansion

blacklistedStructures.desc:: List of blacklisted structures, those won't respawn ever: e.g. minecraft:mansion   Seperate multiple entries by ,

whitelist.desc:: Changes the structure blacklist to a whitelist, default: false
